'''dazhara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallholding|smallholding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallholding|smallholding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dazhara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzhæræth|dæzhæræth]] || [[word:dæzhæræj|dæzhæræj]] || [[word:dæzhæræsh|dæzhæræsh]] || [[word:dæzhæræ|dæzhæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhazharath|dazhazharath]] || [[word:dazhazharaj|dazhazharaj]] || [[word:dazhazharash|dazhazharash]] || [[word:dazhazhara|dazhazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazharath|dazharath]] || [[word:dazharaj|dazharaj]] || [[word:dazharash|dazharash]] || [[word:dazhara|dazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhafrath|dazhafrath]] || [[word:dazhafraj|dazhafraj]] || [[word:dazhafrash|dazhafrash]] || [[word:dazhafraf|dazhafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazharatha|dazharatha]] || [[word:dazharaja|dazharaja]] || [[word:dazharasha|dazharasha]] || [[word:dazharaka|dazharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazharath|dazharath]] || [[word:dazharaj|dazharaj]] || [[word:dazharash|dazharash]] || [[word:dazhara|dazhara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazharathal|dazharathal]] || [[word:dazharajal|dazharajal]] || [[word:dazharashal|dazharashal]] || [[word:dazharakal|dazharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazharathatha|dazharathatha]] || [[word:dazharajaja|dazharajaja]] || [[word:dazharashasha|dazharashasha]] || [[word:dazharaka|dazharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazharathan|dazharathan]] || [[word:dazharajan|dazharajan]] || [[word:dazharashan|dazharashan]] || [[word:dazharakan|dazharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazharathaoro|dazharathaoro]] || [[word:dazharajaoro|dazharajaoro]] || [[word:dazharashaoro|dazharashaoro]] || [[word:dazharakaoro|dazharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
